message:
fix(cargo): disable default features on frankenterm-core workspace dep

Without `default-features = false`, `--no-default-features` on the
frankenterm crate still pulled in all frankenterm-core defaults via
the workspace dependency. Individual features are already forwarded
explicitly in [features].

Closes #42

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
-frankenterm-core.workspace = true
+frankenterm-core = { workspace = true, default-features = false }
 frankenterm-alloc = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 clap.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
